headline: SpaceX Bulls Back, Rocket Lab Surges
detail: Renewed retail enthusiasm for SpaceX is directly fueling momentum in your SPCX and SPAL positions. SPAL is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays over time, so a sentiment reversal hits it twice as hard. Ride it carefully and keep stops tight.

headline: Value Over Growth When Inflation Rises
detail: Oil pushing back above $70 on the Iran deal keeps inflation concerns alive, and the headline explicitly flags that high inflation rotates money from growth to value. Your book is nearly all growth and chip names, so a sustained inflation narrative is a sector-level headwind. Watch whether this gains traction in the coming days.

headline: Salesforce AI Buying Spree, Wall Street Skeptical
detail: Wall Street's skepticism about AI spending payoffs is a read-across risk for the broader AI/tech trade your portfolio is built on. Names like PLTR and CRWD carry heavy AI premium valuations, and any cooling of AI enthusiasm hits them disproportionately. Not a crisis today, but a sentiment signal worth tracking.
